auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Instatus API key sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Create or view it in User settings developer settings: https://dashboard.instatus.com/developer

actions.name: create_component
actions.description: Create one component on an Instatus status page.

pageId.description: The ID of the Instatus status page.

status.description: The status of an Instatus component.

order.description: The order of the component on the status page.

showUptime.description: Whether to show uptime for the component.

grouped.description: Whether the component is a parent or grouped component.

anyOf.description: The ID of the component to group under.

archived.description: Whether the component should be archived.

translations.description: Translations keyed by field name and then language code.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating an Instatus component.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating an Instatus component.

actions.name: create_incident
actions.description: Create one incident on an Instatus status page.

pageId.description: The ID of the Instatus status page.

items.description: The ID of the Instatus component.

components.description: The IDs of components affected by the incident.

started.description: The date and time when the incident started.

status.description: The status of an Instatus incident.

notify.description: Whether to notify subscribers of the incident.

shouldPublish.description: Whether to publish the incident to the page.

id.description: The ID of the Instatus component.

status.description: The status of an Instatus component.

items.description: The status to apply to an affected component.

statuses.description: The statuses to apply to affected components.

translations.description: Translations keyed by field name and then language code.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating an Instatus incident.

id.description: The ID of the incident.

status.description: The status of an Instatus incident.

started.description: The date and time when the incident started.

anyOf.description: The incident duration in minutes.
The date and time when the incident resolved.

id.description: The ID of the incident update.

messageHtml.description: The HTML form of the incident update message.

status.description: The status of an Instatus incident.

notify.description: Whether subscribers were notified for the incident update.

started.description: The date and time when the incident update happened.

anyOf.description: The date and time when the incident update resolved.
The duration of the incident update in minutes.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the incident update was created.

items.description: An update on an Instatus incident.

updates.description: The updates attached to the incident.

id.description: The ID of the affected component.

name.description: The name of the affected component.

anyOf.description: The status of an Instatus component.
The status of an Instatus incident.

status.description: The status reported for the affected component.

showUptime.description: Whether uptime is shown for the affected component.

items.description: A component affected by an Instatus incident.

components.description: The components affected by the incident.

translations.description: Translations keyed by field name and then language code.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating an Instatus incident.

actions.name: list_status_pages
actions.description: List Instatus status pages in the authenticated account.

perPage.description: The number of items per page, up to 100.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Instatus status pages.

id.description: The ID of the status page.

subdomain.description: The subdomain of the status page.

name.description: The name of the status page.

status.description: The computed status of an Instatus status page.

anyOf.description: The logo URL of the status page.
The favicon URL of the status page.
The website URL of the status page.
The custom domain of the status page.
The public email shown on the status page.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the status page was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the status page was updated.

items.description: An Instatus status page.

statusPages.description: The status pages returned by Instatus.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Instatus status pages.
